title: 2026-03-19 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 17.13
description: Daily pressure check for 2026-03-19: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 17.13/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2026-03-19, the score printed 17.13/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
